//: Plain tsc — no transformer. Every token is hand-written, so nothing needs lowering. customConditions:[built] resolves the di family to their built d.ts: importing @rhombus-std/options.augmentations declaration-merges addOptions/configure onto di.core's ServiceManifestBase, which di's own SOURCE could not satisfy its `implements` against — the built declaration has no implements check. The with-transformer example library resolves to dist under every condition regardless. module:ESNext keeps specifiers verbatim for node ESM at runtime; the DOM lib supplies console + AbortSignal (via options → primitives).
